info.title: Excel-DNA Unpack Tool, version
info.description: ExcelDna-Unpack is a command-line utility to extract the contents of Excel-DNA add-ins packed with ExcelDnaPack.

options.name: --xllFile
options.description:
The XLL file to be unpacked; e.g. MyAddIn-packe-
d.xll

options.name: --outFolder
options.description:
[Optional] The folder into which the extracted
files will be written; defaults to `.\unpacked`

options.name: --overwrite
options.description:
[Optional] Allow existing files of the same name
to be overwritten; defaults to `false`
